title: Ryugu Palace Becomes the Focus
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Robin, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones, New Fish-Man Pirates. The core story beat is ryugu palace becomes the focus.
scene: The scene centers on ryugu palace becomes the focus, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Robin, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones, New Fish-Man Pirates driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...he'll take us all out without even using his hands...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: those handcuffs... is he trying to say...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All Fishmen are born with a physical strength ten times that of an ordinary human!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: The life of Fisher Tiger, cut short by thoughtless humans!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Swallow a single one of these energy steroid pills... and that strength is doubled, to twenty times a human's strength!!! And a second pill will double it once more!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In return for this miraculous power, the user's very life is drained slowly away!! But we care not... we will execute our plan, whatever the cost!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: The will of Arlong!! We will put an end to it all... to the entire cruel history of our kind...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hencehoooh, you're welcome

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: We, the new fishman pirates!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WH... what's he planning to do...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take them to the new world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Roger, Boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Dear, dear... I do hope they're not all dead after that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: JAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA HA!!...They'd better still be alive...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I need them alive but scared... ready to take my message to the world above...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Tell them all, humans!!! Tell them what happened to you in the ocean depths... tell them who did this.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let fear strike the hearts of the land-dwelling human scum!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: For we will seize fishman Island, centre of the world, from the hands of that worthless "God", Neptunee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: And we will haul the humans down into the blackest depths!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will prove once and for all that fishmen are the one true master race!!!!

summary: Ryugu Palace Becomes the Focus. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
